No gRPC/protobuf servers or generated stubs in repo; dimension tracked explicitly.
medium risk waiver: CodeQL workflow coverage is present; upload and default-query policy remain provider and organization governed.
medium risk waiver: PR dependency review fail-on-severity is high while transitive-noise exceptions remain tracked in the policy artifact.
low risk waiver: Infra-only or provider-console workflows are excluded from product QA surface until adopted as product-facing checks.
medium risk waiver: Phase-2 QA dimensions are explicitly deferred until substantive route, identity, distributed, and AI coverage lands.
medium risk waiver: WCAG 2.2 taxonomy rows stay waived until each success criterion has direct Playwright or Vitest automation.
medium risk waiver: Semgrep SARIF workflow exists while rule-pack blocking policy remains centrally governed.
medium risk waiver: Filesystem Trivy execution is present, but blocking tier policy depends on organization scanner ownership.
medium risk waiver: DAST baseline is represented by a disabled-by-default workflow until a governed staging URL is available.
